pierre.name: Pierre Curie
pierre.notes: Nobel laureate in Physics (1903) for research on radioactivity, jointly with Marie Curie and Henri Becquerel.

marie.name: Marie Skłodowska-Curie
marie.notes: First woman to win a Nobel Prize and the only person to win Nobel Prizes in two different sciences (Physics 1903, Chemistry 1911).

irene.name: Irène Joliot-Curie
irene.notes: Nobel laureate in Chemistry (1935), shared with her husband Frédéric for their discovery of artificial radioactivity.

frederic.name: Frédéric Joliot-Curie
frederic.notes: Nobel laureate in Chemistry (1935). Took the name Joliot-Curie upon marriage.

helene.name: Hélène Langevin-Joliot
helene.notes: French nuclear physicist; researcher at the Institut de Physique Nucléaire.

eve.name: Ève Curie
eve.notes: Author of the Madame Curie biography; war correspondent and UNICEF special advisor.

henry.name: Henry R. Labouisse Jr.
henry.notes: American diplomat; executive director of UNICEF, accepted the 1965 Nobel Peace Prize on its behalf.
